stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the mountain effect as regards radio wave propagation?

options.a: It prevents an aircraft at low altitude receiving VOR signals due to mountains blocking the radio waves.
options.b: It can be caused by diffraction of an NDB signal bending the path of the radio waves.
options.c: It can be caused by refraction of an NDB signal changing the path of the radio waves.
options.d: It can be caused by refraction of a VOR signal bending the path of the radio waves.
